title: poa gayana
intro: Poa gayana, also known as blue grama grass, is a species of grass native to the Great Plains of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Poa gayana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
